name: text_to_speech
description: Convert text to speech. Returns an audio URL. OpenAI TTS HD voices: alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer. ElevenLabs voices are also available when configured -- pass the prefixed id as voice (e.g. elevenlabs:<voice_id> for premium or cloned voices); list_tts_voices shows the available ElevenLabs voice ids.

voice.description: Voice: alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer (default: onyx). Or an ElevenLabs voice id prefixed elevenlabs:<voice_id> (premium/cloned voices) when ElevenLabs is configured.
